codeReview.summary: The commit satisfies the feature intent: it adds explicit lint/format gate scripts and a console-warning policy document, while the handoff and transcript provide evidence that the required final gates (tsc main/node, full vitest, demo-gallery desktop e2e, dev boot/HMR/deeplink checks) were executed successfully. No blocking implementation defects were found in this feature scope.

issues.description: The document references `collectConsoleNoise` and `allowedConsoleWarnPatterns` in `src/e2e/demo-gallery.spec.ts`, but those identifiers are not present in the current spec. This creates documentation drift and can mislead future gate updates.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The assigned `ui-screen-worker` skill is not a good fit for gate-only verification features like `m7-final-gates` because its required TDD/UI-implementation procedure does not apply, leading to avoidable deviation notes in otherwise-correct runs.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff `skillFeedback.deviations` for worker session `549ee949-0fae-4156-83f9-759bcc2592bf` explicitly says the `ui-screen-worker` TDD step was skipped for this verification-only feature; `.factory/skills/ui-screen-worker/SKILL.md` mandates RED-first tests and UI build flow.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The shared command catalog does not include the new `npm run lint` and `npm run format:check` gates introduced by this feature, so validators that rely on `.factory/services.yaml` do not have canonical entries for the final-gates scripts.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: New scripts were added in `package.json` lines 14-15, but `.factory/services.yaml` `commands:` section has no `lint`/`format:check` entries.

summary: Review result: PASS. `m7-final-gates` commit 85d9500 meets the feature’s final-gate objective with clear evidence of passing checks and the expected lint/format script surface. One non-blocking documentation drift item and two shared-state observations (skill fit, services command catalog completeness) were recorded.
